headlines.description: Donyell Malen scored twice as Borussia Dortmund eased past hosts Cologne 4-0 on Saturday to make it two Bundesliga wins in a row this year.
headlines.shortLinkText: Malen double sees Dortmund beat Cologne 4-0

video.headline: Malen grabs brace as Dortmund hammer Cologne

tracking.trackingName: SOC_One-Play (Malen grabs brace as Dortmund hammer Cologne) 2024/01/20 ESHEET

headlines.description: Xabi Alonso's team are now on 48 points from 18 games, with second-placed Bayern Munich, who play Werder Bremen on Sunday, on 41 from 16 matches.
headlines.shortLinkText: Late winner sees Leverkusen beat Leipzig 3-2

video.headline: Hincapie leads Leverkusen to another thrilling late win

tracking.trackingName: SOC_Highlight (Hincapie leads Leverkusen to another thrilling late win) 2024/01/20 ESHEET
